meta.tagline: Expert Talks · AI Tooling · Client Pipeline · Evangelist Shoutouts

featured.title: Expert Talk Series — First of Series
featured.subject: Bryan Finster
featured.subject_subtitle: Bringing an outside perspective to AI transformation & delivery
featured.summary: Bryan shared his experiences with Agentic workflows and his journey from AI-denialist to AI-advocate. This series brings fresh, external perspective to how we think about AI at scale.

tooling.headline: Tool Assessment Finalising This Month
tooling.body: Trialling AI tools across the business — direction coming very soon.

client_pipeline.intro: A select few opportunities this month...

clients.ask: Build an Agentic operational platform within AWS
clients.answer: Platform for all Flutter UKI sub-brands + Agent marketplace for all teams

clients.ask: Analyse AI delivery capability and maturity
clients.answer: 3 CF domain teams proposed transformation on Customer Service — AI-enabled self-service

clients.ask: Drive AI adoption within Royal London teams
clients.answer: Embed a Principal Engineer as first mover, 50/50 on delivery and transformation

clients.ask: Support Zuto — a scaling car finance broker in rapid growth
clients.answer: CF as transformation partner, Agentic AI to drive efficiencies and improve white-glove service
